headline: Spotting Winners: Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) And Building Materials Stocks In Q4
summary: Wrapping up Q4 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the building materials stocks, including Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) and its peers.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Martin Marietta Materials, Lowers Price Target to $702
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Angel Castillo   maintains Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $706 to $702.
